title: Bœuf Bourguignon

title: Coq au Vin

title: Cassoulet

title: Blanquette de Veau
description: Pale, elegant veal stew finished with a velvety cream and egg-yolk sauce with mushrooms and pearl onions.

title: Daube de Bœuf Provençale
description: Provençal beef braise fragrant with olives, orange peel, herbes de Provence, and robust red wine.

title: Pot-au-Feu
description: Classic French boiled dinner of beef shank and marrow bones simmered with root vegetables in a clear, nourishing broth.

title: Navarin d'Agneau Printanier
description: Spring lamb stew with tender turnips, carrots, peas, and new potatoes in a light, herb-scented broth.

title: Bœuf en Daube à la Niçoise
description: Niçoise-style braised beef with tomatoes, capers, anchovies, and black olives in white wine.

title: Poulet en Cocotte Bonne Femme
description: Whole chicken pot-roasted with lardons, potatoes, and pearl onions in a covered cocotte until supremely juicy.

title: Gigot d'Agneau Braisé
description: Whole leg of lamb braised low and slow with aromatic vegetables and white wine until fork-tender.

title: Poule au Pot

title: Ragout de Veau Marengo
description: Veal ragù braised with tomatoes, white wine, mushrooms, and olives in the style of a Napoleonic victory dish.

title: Carbonnade Flamande
description: Belgian-inspired beef and onion stew braised in dark ale with a touch of mustard and brown sugar.

title: Bœuf à la Mode
description: Larded pot roast braised in wine and cognac with carrots and onions, yielding a rich, gelatinous sauce.

title: Lapin à la Moutarde
description: Rabbit pieces braised in white wine and crème fraîche with a bold coating of Dijon mustard and herbs.

title: Osso Buco à la Provençale
description: Cross-cut veal shanks braised with tomatoes, white wine, and gremolata in the Provençal style Julia adored.

title: Fricassée de Poulet à l'Ancienne
description: Old-fashioned creamy chicken fricassee braised gently in white wine with mushrooms and pearl onions.

title: Soupe au Pistou
description: Provençal vegetable and bean soup simmered with pasta and finished with a vibrant garlic-basil pistou.

title: Garbure Gasconne
description: Hearty Gascon cabbage and bean soup-stew loaded with preserved duck, ham hock, and root vegetables.

title: Potée Auvergnate
description: Rustic Auvergnat one-pot of salt pork, smoked sausage, cabbage, and root vegetables simmered in broth.

title: Crawfish Étouffée
description: Sweet crawfish tails smothered in a rich butter-and-trinity roux sauce, deeply seasoned with Creole spice

title: Shrimp Étouffée
description: Gulf shrimp nestled in a velvety smothered sauce of onion, celery, bell pepper, and cayenne-laced butter

title: Chicken and Andouille Gumbo
description: Dark, smoky roux-based broth loaded with tender chicken, spicy andouille sausage, and filé-thickened silk

title: Seafood Gumbo
description: Oceanic gumbo of shrimp, crab, and oysters swimming in a deep mahogany roux with okra and holy trinity

title: Duck and Andouille Gumbo
description: Slow-braised duck legs and smoked sausage in a bold, espresso-dark roux gumbo with Creole seasoning

title: Oyster and Artichoke Soup
description: Briny Gulf oysters and tender artichoke hearts in a rich, herb-scented cream-and-oyster-liquor broth

title: Turtle Soup au Sherry
description: Antoine's storied slow-simmered turtle meat in a dark, spiced beef-and-tomato broth finished with dry sherry

title: Shrimp Creole
description: Plump Gulf shrimp braised in a bold tomato sauce with onion, garlic, and fiery Creole seasonings

title: Chicken Pontalba
description: Braised chicken in a rich sauce of ham, mushrooms, and green onions over a deeply flavored Creole base

title: Daube Créole
description: Commander's Palace–style beef pot roast braised low and slow with red wine, Creole mustard, and root vegetables

title: Grillades and Gravy
description: Slow-braised medallions of beef or veal in a dark tomato-and-pepper gravy, a Creole Sunday morning classic

title: Smothered Rabbit
description: Jointed rabbit braised until meltingly tender in a glossy dark gravy of onion, garlic, and Creole herbs

title: Red Beans and Rice (Creole Style)
description: Monday's slow-simmered Camellia red beans with pickled pork, andouille, and the holy trinity of Creole cooking

title: Crab Bisque
description: Galatoire's-style velvety bisque of Gulf blue crab cooked into a sherry-kissed, cream-enriched Creole stock

title: Oyster Stew Creole
description: Plump oysters barely simmered in a butter-rich broth with leeks, herbs, and a whisper of cayenne heat

title: Étouffée de Homard
description: Louisiana lobster tails smothered in the classic butter-trinity étouffée sauce with brandy and Creole spice

title: Pork Debris Stew

title: Chicken Fricassee Creole
description: Bone-in chicken pieces simmered in a rich brown roux gravy with mushrooms, pearl onions, and Creole seasoning

title: Bouillabaisse à la Créole
description: New Orleans–style fisherman's stew of Gulf fish, shrimp, and crab in a saffron-and-tomato Creole broth

title: Smothered Okra with Shrimp
description: Silky slow-cooked okra broken down into a thick, tomatoey stew with Gulf shrimp and Creole spice

title: Ragù Bolognese
description: Slow-cooked ground beef and pork with soffritto, white wine, milk, and a whisper of tomato — the soul of Bologna.

title: Ossobuco alla Milanese
description: Braised cross-cut veal shanks in white wine, broth, and gremolata — collagen-rich, golden, and deeply Lombard.

title: Brasato al Barolo

title: Risotto alla Milanese
description: Carnaroli rice stirred with saffron-stained bone-marrow broth and finished with a snowfall of Parmigiano.

title: Minestrone alla Genovese
description: A generous riot of seasonal vegetables, cannellini beans, and pasta stirred through with fragrant basil pesto.

title: Ribollita
description: Tuscan twice-cooked bread soup thick with cavolo nero, cannellini, and stale pane sciocco — humble and magnificent.

title: Pollo alla Cacciatora
description: Chicken pieces braised with tomatoes, rosemary, olives, and white wine in the hunter's rustic, forthright style.

title: Spezzatino di Vitello
description: Veal shoulder cut in chunks and gently braised with peas, white wine, and lemon zest — a pale, delicate Venetian stew.

title: Stracotto di Manzo
description: Beef pot roast braised low and slow with onion, celery, carrot, and red wine until it falls apart in rich, glossy juices.

title: Agnello alla Romana

title: Fagioli all'Uccelletto

title: Sugo di Carne
description: A simple but soulful pork and beef meat sauce with tomato and onion — Marcella's everyday Sunday table ragu.

title: Maiale al Latte

title: Trippa alla Fiorentina

title: Zuppa di Lenticchie
description: Earthy Umbrian lentil soup with pancetta, celery, and a finish of good olive oil — warming, wholesome, and unpretentious.

title: Polpette in Umido
description: Tender beef and mortadella meatballs simmered in a light tomato and white wine broth rather than fried and forgotten.

title: Risotto con Funghi Porcini

title: Coniglio in Padella
description: Rabbit pieces braised with white wine, garlic, fresh rosemary, and pancetta in the clean, aromatic style of the Italian countryside.

title: Zuppa Pavese
description: A restorative Lombard broth ladled over toasted bread and a poached egg, gilded with aged Parmigiano.

title: Stinco di Maiale
description: Whole pork shank pressure-braised with white wine, garlic, and juniper until the skin turns lacquered and the meat surrenders.

title: Dal Makhani
description: Slow-simmered black urad lentils and kidney beans enriched with butter, cream, and smoky tomato.

title: Rogan Josh
description: Tender braised lamb bathed in a deep Kashmiri red-chile and aromatic spice gravy.

title: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
description: Succulent chicken in a velvety tomato-cream sauce fragrant with fenugreek and garam masala.

title: Chicken Korma
description: Gentle, golden-hued chicken braise in a rich cashew, yogurt, and cardamom-scented sauce.

title: Lamb Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with spiced braised lamb, saffron, and caramelised onions.

title: Chana Masala
description: Robust chickpeas simmered in a tangy, cumin-and-coriander-charged tomato-onion masala.

title: Aloo Gobi
description: Cauliflower and potato tumbled with turmeric, ginger, and mustard seeds in a dry-finish curry.

title: Saag Gosht
description: Meltingly tender lamb slow-braised into a vivid, spiced spinach gravy.

title: Chicken Vindaloo
description: Fiery Goan braised chicken steeped in red chiles, vinegar, and toasted spices.

title: Tarka Dal
description: Silky yellow lentils finished with a sizzling pour of cumin, garlic, and dried red-chile tarka.

title: Lamb Nihari
description: Deeply aromatic, slow-cooked lamb shank braise in a rich bone-marrow and whole-spice broth.

title: Keema Matar
description: Spiced minced lamb and sweet peas simmered together in a ginger-tomato-onion masala.

title: Rajma
description: Hearty red kidney beans cooked down in a warming North Indian tomato and cumin gravy.

title: Chicken Chettinad
description: Bold South Indian chicken curry crackling with kalpasi, kalpasi, black pepper, and fresh coconut.

title: Lamb Dhansak
description: Parsi slow-braise of lamb and mixed lentils with sweet-sour tamarind and warming spices.

title: Beef Madras
description: Deep, brick-red slow-braised beef in a feisty South Indian curry with tamarind and dried chiles.

title: Pork Vindaloo
description: Goa's signature tangy-hot pork braise marinated in garlic, red chiles, and palm vinegar.

title: Cholar Dal

title: Lamb Dopiaza

title: Matar Paneer
description: Fresh Indian cheese and green peas in a lush, ginger-and-tomato-spiked golden gravy.

title: Mole Poblano

title: Mole Coloradito

description: Golden Oaxacan braise of guajillo and ancho chiles with masa as thickener, poured over pork ribs and chayote.

title: Mole Verde con Cerdo
description: Vivid green mole of tomatillos, pepitas, serrano chiles, and fresh herbs blanketing tender braised pork.

title: Birria de Res
description: Slow-braised beef in a deeply spiced guajillo, ancho, and cumin consommé, the meat falling apart in its own rich broth.

title: Birria de Chivo

title: Cochinita Pibil
description: Yucatecan pork marinated in achiote and bitter orange juice, braised until it collapses into smoky, citrus-stained shreds.

title: Pozole Rojo
description: Hearty hominy and pork shoulder soup simmered in a deep ancho-guajillo broth, served with shredded cabbage and lime.

title: Pozole Verde
description: Hominy and chicken simmered in a tangy tomatillo, epazote, and pepita broth that is bright, herbal, and deeply nourishing.

title: Tinga Poblana de Cerdo
description: Shredded pork shoulder braised with chipotle, tomato, and onion into a smoky, rust-coloured ragù from Puebla.

title: Carnitas Michoacanas

title: Caldo Tlalpeño
description: Smoky chipotle and garbanzo bean soup with chicken, epazote, and avocado, a classic broth-pot dish from the Valley of Mexico.

title: Estofado de Pollo
description: Yucatecan sweet-savoury chicken braise with green olives, capers, tomatoes, and pickled jalapeños in a saffron-tinted sauce.

title: Chile Colorado con Carne
description: Cubed pork or beef simmered in a brick-red sauce of ancho, guajillo, and pasilla chiles with cumin and oregano until deeply tender.

title: Adobo de Cerdo
description: Pork shoulder slowly braised in a tangy paste of ancho chiles, piloncillo, cider vinegar, and garlic until the sauce clings and caramelises.

title: Pollo en Pipián Rojo
description: Chicken bathed in a rust-coloured pepita and dried-chile sauce thickened with toasted pumpkin seeds and fragrant with Mexican cinnamon.

title: Caldo de Res
description: Robust beef shank and marrow bone broth loaded with chayote, corn, calabacita, and fresh herbs, a sustaining pot dish of the Mexican home.

title: Sopa de Lima Yucateca
description: Fragrant chicken broth scented with toasted dried chiles and the irreplaceable sour local lima citrus, ladled over crisp tortilla strips.

title: Manchamanteles

title: Lamb Tagine with Prunes & Almonds
description: Slow-braised lamb shoulder melting into a honey-spiced sauce with plump prunes, toasted almonds, and cinnamon.

title: Chicken Tagine with Preserved Lemon & Olives
description: Succulent chicken thighs braised with saffron, ginger, cracked green olives, and intensely salty preserved lemon rind.

title: Harira
description: Morocco's great soulful soup of lamb, chickpeas, lentils, tomato, and a tangle of vermicelli brightened with lemon and fresh cilantro.

title: Lamb Tagine with Caramelized Onions & Honey
description: Tender lamb buried under a mound of slow-melted onions glazed with honey, saffron, and a whisper of ras el hanout.

title: Mrouzia
description: A rich, deeply spiced lamb tagine sweetened with honey and raisins, perfumed with ras el hanout and warm cinnamon — a Moroccan feast dish.

title: Daube Provençale
description: Beef braised low and slow in red wine with niçoise olives, lardons, orange peel, herbes de Provence, and anchovy depth.

title: Chicken Tagine with Chickpeas & Ras el Hanout
description: Fall-apart chicken thighs simmered with plump chickpeas, tomato, and a fragrant Moroccan spice blend.

title: Lamb Tagine with Artichokes & Preserved Lemon
description: Braised lamb with tender artichoke hearts, saffron broth, and the sharp brightness of preserved lemon and fresh herbs.

title: Boeuf en Daube Niçoise
description: A Niçoise take on the classic daube — beef cheeks, carrots, and black olives slow-braised in wine with orange zest and juniper.

title: Lamb Tagine with Root Vegetables & Chermoula
description: Chunks of braised lamb nested with honeyed root vegetables, finished with a vibrant chermoula of cilantro, cumin, and preserved lemon.

title: Poulet au Vinaigre

title: Lamb Tagine with Green Olives & Preserved Lemon
description: Bone-in lamb shoulder with briny cracked green olives, ginger, saffron, and preserved lemon in a luminous golden braise.

description: Tender chicken thighs braised with caramelized fennel, saffron, white wine, and a hint of anise in the Wolfert Mediterranean spirit.

title: Pork Daube with Dried Fruit

title: Kefta Tagine with Eggs & Tomato
description: Spiced lamb meatballs simmered in a rich, cumin-scented tomato sauce finished with whole eggs poached directly in the braise.

title: 豚骨ラーメンスープ (Tonkotsu Ramen Broth)

title: 醤油ラーメンスープ (Shōyu Ramen Broth)

title: 味噌ラーメンスープ (Miso Ramen Broth)
description: Robust pork and chicken broth enriched with blended red and white miso paste.

title: おでん (Oden)

title: 肉じゃが (Nikujaga)

title: 豚の角煮 (Buta no Kakuni)

title: 鶏の水炊き (Tori Nabe / Mizutaki)

title: 筑前煮 (Chikuzen-ni)

title: すき焼き (Sukiyaki)

title: 牛すじ煮込み (Gyūsuji Nikomi)

title: 豚キムチ鍋 (Buta Kimchi Nabe)

title: 鰤大根 (Buri Daikon)
description: Yellowtail collar and thick daikon rounds braised in a rich soy, sake, and mirin glaze.

title: 鶏と根菜の煮物 (Tori to Konsai no Nimono)

title: さば味噌煮 (Saba Misoni)

title: かぼちゃの煮物 (Kabocha no Nimono)

title: 牛丼の具 (Gyūdon no Gu)

title: 豚バラ大根 (Buta Bara Daikon)

title: Phở Bò
description: Rich, star anise and charred ginger beef bone broth with rice noodles, tender sliced beef, and fresh herbs.

title: Phở Gà
description: Delicate golden chicken broth scented with cinnamon and coriander seed, served with silky rice noodles and shredded chicken.

title: Bò Kho

title: Thịt Kho Tàu
description: Pork belly and hard-boiled eggs braised low and slow in coconut water, fish sauce, and caramel until glossy and deeply savory.

title: Cá Kho Tộ

title: Bún Bò Huế
description: Spicy central Vietnamese lemongrass and shrimp-paste beef bone broth with thick round noodles, pork hock, and chilli oil.

title: Cháo Gà
description: Silky broken-rice congee simmered with whole chicken, ginger, and fish sauce, topped with crispy shallots and fresh ginger julienne.

title: Cháo Lòng

title: Súp Măng Cua
description: Silky crab and bamboo shoot soup thickened with egg ribbons and wood-ear mushrooms in a delicate, warming broth.

title: Lẩu Thái

title: Thịt Bò Hầm Rau Củ

title: Chân Giò Hầm
description: Slow-braised pork trotter simmered with lotus root, peanuts, and rock sugar until the collagen-rich meat is meltingly tender.

title: Gà Kho Gừng
description: Chicken browned and braised in caramelised fish sauce with generous fresh ginger and cracked black pepper until sticky and fragrant.

title: Bò Hầm Tiêu Đen

title: Canh Khổ Qua Nhồi Thịt

title: Vịt Nấu Chao

title: Cháo Vịt
description: Comforting duck congee simmered with broken rice, ginger, and five-spice, served with shredded duck and crispy shallots.

title: Mì Quảng

title: Hủ Tiếu Nam Vang
description: Southern pork and seafood noodle soup with a clear, sweet pork bone broth, dried squid, and crispy garlic.

title: Galbijjim

title: Kimchi Jjigae
description: Fiery, deeply fermented kimchi simmered with pork belly and tofu in a ruddy, umami-laden broth.

title: Doenjang Jjigae

title: Seolleongtang
description: Milky, long-simmered ox bone and brisket soup with a pure, collagen-rich white broth seasoned simply at the table.

title: Dak-dori-tang
description: Spicy braised chicken pieces slow-cooked with potatoes, carrots, and gochujang in a sticky, fiery sauce.

title: Budae Jjigae
description: Bold army base stew loaded with kimchi, Spam, hot dogs, baked beans, ramen noodles, and gochujang in a smoky broth.

title: Sundubu Jjigae
description: Silken soft tofu trembling in a blazing red broth of clams, pork, and gochugaru finished with a raw egg.

title: Dakgalbi Jjim
description: Spicy braised chicken thighs with sweet potato, cabbage, and tteok in a caramelized gochujang glaze.

title: Haemul Sundubu Jjigae
description: Seafood-packed soft tofu stew brimming with shrimp, clams, and squid in a fiery scarlet broth.

title: Dwaeji Galbijjim
description: Tender pork spare ribs braised in a sweet-savory soy and ginger sauce with daikon and glass noodles.

title: Bossam
description: Pork shoulder simmered low and slow in a fragrant broth of doenjang, ginger, and garlic until yielding and silky.

title: Galbitang
description: Clear, delicate beef short rib soup slow-cooked until the meat slides from the bone in a clean, golden broth.

title: Yukgaejang
description: Fiercely spicy shredded beef soup with fernbrake, egg ribbons, and green onions in a deep gochugaru broth.

title: Saengtae Jjigae
description: Robust pollock stew with radish, tofu, and a gochugaru-spiked broth that is bright and bracingly cold-weather warming.

title: Ojingeo Jjigae
description: Tender squid braised with zucchini and tofu in a tangy, spicy gochujang and doenjang broth.

title: Kongbiji Jjigae
description: Thick, porridge-like stew of ground soybeans simmered with kimchi and pork into a creamy, hearty bowl.

title: Andong Jjimdak
description: Braised whole chicken with glass noodles, potatoes, and dried chilies in a rich, sticky soy and ginger sauce from Andong.

title: Tteokgalbi Jjim
description: Braised short rib patties and tteok glazed in a sweet soy and honey sauce until deeply caramelized and tender.

title: Gochujang Jjigae
description: Punchy fermented red chili paste stew with pork, zucchini, and tofu in a bold, warming scarlet broth.

title: Maeuntang
description: Fiery Korean fish stew with fresh cod or sea bass, radish, and watercress in a shimmering gochugaru broth.

title: 红烧肉 (Hóng Shāo Ròu)
description: Pork belly slow-braised in soy sauce, Shaoxing wine, rock sugar, and spices until lacquered and trembling-tender.

title: 东坡肉 (Dōngpō Ròu)
description: Thick slabs of skin-on pork belly braised in a rich Shaoxing wine and soy liquor, silky and intensely flavoured.

title: 麻婆豆腐 (Má Pó Dòufu)
description: Silken tofu and ground pork simmered in a fiery, numbing sauce of doubanjiang, fermented black beans, and Sichuan peppercorn.

title: 狮子头 (Shīzi Tóu) Lion's Head Meatballs
description: Giant, cloud-soft pork meatballs braised with napa cabbage in a delicate, amber master broth.

title: 白粥 (Báizhōu) Congee
description: Long-grain or jasmine rice simmered to a silken, ivory porridge — the ultimate blank canvas for toppings.

title: 皮蛋瘦肉粥 (Pídàn Shòuròu Zhōu)

title: 卤水鸡 (Lǔshuǐ Jī) Master-Stock Chicken
description: Whole chicken poached in an aromatic master stock of soy, star anise, cassia, and Shaoxing wine until perfumed to the bone.

title: 红烧牛尾 (Hóng Shāo Niúwěi) Red-Braised Oxtail
description: Collagen-rich oxtail braised in soy, rock sugar, and warm spices until the meat falls from the bone in glossy, sticky pools.

title: 红烧猪蹄 (Hóng Shāo Zhūtí)
description: Pork trotters braised in soy sauce, rice wine, and rock sugar until gelatinous, mahogany-glazed, and fall-apart tender.

title: 卤猪肉 (Lǔ Zhūròu) Soy-Braised Pork
description: Pork shoulder slow-simmered in a spiced soy master stock until deeply savoury, sliceable, and fragrant with five-spice.

title: 红烧羊肉 (Hóng Shāo Yángròu)
description: Bone-in lamb braised with fermented bean paste, ginger, and warm spices in a rich, ruddy northern-style braise.

title: 萝卜炖牛腩 (Luóbo Dùn Niúnǎn)
description: Beef brisket and daikon simmered together in a clear, ginger-scented broth until both are meltingly soft.

title: 红烧排骨 (Hóng Shāo Páigǔ)
description: Pork spare ribs braised in soy, Shaoxing wine, and rock sugar to a sticky, caramelised glaze.

title: 土豆炖牛肉 (Tǔdòu Dùn Niúròu)
description: Chunky beef and potato stewed in a soy-enriched, spiced broth — a beloved home-style northern comfort dish.

title: 三杯鸡 (Sānbēi Jī) Three-Cup Chicken
description: Chicken braised in equal measures of sesame oil, soy sauce, and rice wine with whole garlic, ginger, and fresh basil.

title: 卤蛋 (Lǔdàn) Master-Stock Braised Eggs
description: Hard-boiled eggs simmered in soy, star anise, and cassia until the whites are marbled and deeply savoury.

title: 粉蒸肉 (Fěn Zhēng Ròu)
description: Pork belly coated in spiced rice flour and braised in the pressure cooker until the coating becomes a silky, fragrant crust.

title: 红烧带鱼 (Hóng Shāo Dàiyú)
description: Ribbonfish braised in soy sauce, vinegar, ginger, and chilli until the flesh is tender and the sauce clings and glows.

title: 酸菜白肉锅 (Suāncài Báiròu Guō)
description: Thinly sliced pork belly and pungent fermented Napa cabbage simmered together in a clear, bracingly sour broth.

title: 腐乳红烧肉 (Fǔrǔ Hóng Shāo Ròu)
description: Pork belly braised with creamy fermented red tofu, adding an extra layer of umami depth and a blush-red colour.

title: Braised Beef Brisket
description: Slow-cooked beef brisket in a rich tomato-onion gravy until fork-tender and deeply savory

title: Cholent
description: Hearty Sabbath stew of beef, barley, beans, potatoes, and marrow bones slow-braised overnight

title: Matzo Ball Soup
description: Golden chicken broth swimming with fluffy, pillowy matzo balls and tender pulled chicken

title: Stuffed Cabbage Rolls (Holishkes)
description: Cabbage leaves filled with spiced beef and rice, braised in a sweet-and-sour tomato sauce

title: Jewish-Style Chicken Fricassee
description: Chicken wings, meatballs, and gizzards braised in a paprika-laced tomato and mushroom gravy

title: Braised Beef Short Ribs
description: Bone-in short ribs braised low and slow in red wine, onions, and root vegetables until fall-off-the-bone tender

title: Flanken (Cross-Cut Short Ribs)
description: Thin-cut cross-rib flanken braised in a sweet onion and tomato broth, deeply flavored and fork-tender

title: Tzimmes with Brisket
description: Brisket braised with carrots, sweet potatoes, prunes, and honey in a lush, caramelized sweet broth

title: Split Pea Soup with Smoked Meat
description: Thick, velvety green split pea soup enriched with smoky flanken or beef bones and soft carrots

title: Mushroom Barley Soup
description: Earthy, deeply satisfying soup of pearl barley, dried porcini, and root vegetables in a rich beef broth

title: Chicken Paprikash
description: Bone-in chicken pieces braised in a silky sour cream and sweet paprika sauce of Hungarian-Jewish heritage

title: Kreplach Soup
description: Tender meat-filled dumplings bobbing in a clear, amber chicken broth with soft onion and dill

title: Beef and Cabbage Borscht
description: Robust sweet-and-sour beet and cabbage soup loaded with braised beef, tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon

title: Pickled Tongue (Braised Lengua)
description: Cured beef tongue braised until silky-tender, sliced thin and served in its own savory cooking liquor

title: Kasha Varnishkes with Braised Mushrooms
description: Toasted buckwheat groats and bow-tie pasta enriched with caramelized onions and woodsy mushroom braise

title: Lamb Tzimmes
description: Lamb shoulder braised with dried apricots, carrots, and honey into a sticky, fragrant festival stew

title: White Bean and Smoked Brisket Soup
description: Creamy cannellini beans simmered with smoky shredded brisket, celery root, and fresh dill in chicken broth

title: Oxtail and Root Vegetable Braise
description: Gelatinous oxtail braised with turnips, parsnips, and caramelized onions in a dark, wine-enriched gravy

title: Chicken Soup with Noodles and Dill
description: Classic golden Jewish penicillin — long-simmered whole chicken broth with egg noodles, carrots, and bright dill

title: Braised Veal Breast (Gefüllte Brust)
description: Bone-in veal breast stuffed with a savory bread and herb filling, braised until meltingly tender in its own juices

title: Cocido Madrileño
description: A grand Madrid boiled dinner of chickpeas, salt-cured chorizo, morcilla, pork belly, and marrow bones in a golden broth.

title: Fabada Asturiana
description: Asturias's soul-warming stew of fat white fabes beans slow-simmered with lacón, chorizo, and smoky morcilla.

title: Callos a la Madrileña
description: Madrid's celebrated tripe stew with chickpeas, chorizo, morcilla, and paprika-spiced tomato sauce.

title: Rabo de Toro
description: Andalusian braised oxtail melting into a rich, wine-dark sauce perfumed with cloves, bay, and sweet paprika.

title: Lentejas con Chorizo
description: Humble Spanish lentil stew with smoky chorizo, cumin, carrots, and a sofrito of onion and tomato.

title: Pollo al Chilindrón
description: Aragonese chicken braised with roasted red peppers, tomatoes, jamón, and white wine in a vivid scarlet sauce.

title: Estofado de Ternera
description: Spanish veal stew with olives, white wine, saffron, and sweet paprika in a silky braising broth.

title: Caldo Gallego
description: Galician white bean and salt-pork broth layered with grelos, turnip greens, and chorizo.

title: Pote Asturiano
description: Asturian mountain stew of white beans, potatoes, cabbage, salt pork, and blood sausage.

title: Olla Podrida
description: Castile's ancient hearty pot of beans, pork ribs, chorizo, and root vegetables simmered into a deeply savory stew.

title: Potaje de Vigilia
description: Lenten chickpea and spinach stew enriched with salt cod, garlic, and smoky pimentón de la Vera.

title: Puchero Andaluz
description: Andalusian chickpea pot with chicken, beef, chorizo, pumpkin, and a bright garnish of fresh mint.

title: Estofado de Jabalí
description: Wild boar braised with red wine, juniper berries, thyme, and smoked paprika in the tradition of Spanish game cookery.

title: Alubias con Sacramentos
description: Navarran red bean stew simmered with ears, trotters, ribs, and black pudding from the Pyrenean border tradition.

title: Conejo al Ajillo
description: Rabbit braised low and slow with a generous pour of white wine, crushed garlic, rosemary, and olive oil.

title: Marmitako
description: Basque fisherman's bonito and potato stew with green peppers, tomato, and a generous hand of choregraphed pimentón.

title: Berza Jerezana
description: Sherry-country chickpea and winter greens pot cooked with pork tail, snout, and a glass of dry fino.

title: Cordero a la Pastora
description: Shepherd-style lamb stew with dried ñora peppers, saffron, almonds, and white wine from the Castilian meseta.

title: Arroz con Pollo a la Española
description: Spanish one-pot chicken and rice simmered with saffron, tomatoes, green olives, and dry sherry.

title: Carne con Tomate
description: Andalusian braised pork or beef in a slow-cooked tomato and white wine sauce fragrant with garlic and bay leaf.

title: Marhagulyás
description: Tender beef chunks, sweet paprika, caraway and potato simmered into Hungary's defining hearty soup-stew.

title: Csirkepaprikás
description: Chicken thighs blanketed in a rich, tangy sour-cream and red paprika sauce — silky and deeply comforting.

title: Székelykáposzta
description: Pork shoulder and sauerkraut braised together with smoked paprika and a swirl of sour cream into a boldly tangy stew.

title: Marhapörkölt
description: Slow-cooked beef in a thick, intensely paprika-laden onion sauce — Hungary's purest, most concentrated pörkölt.

title: Sertéspörkölt
description: Pork shoulder braised down with lard, onions and sweet paprika into a rich, rust-coloured stew.

title: Báránypörkölt
description: Lamb shoulder with hot and sweet paprika, garlic and tomato — a robustly flavoured pastoral pörkölt.

title: Borjúpaprikás
description: Veal in a pale, delicate paprika-and-sour-cream sauce, lighter and more refined than its chicken cousin.

title: Erdélyi tokány
description: Transylvanian beef strips braised with bacon, mushrooms and wine into a silky, mildly spiced ragù.

title: Svíčková na smetaně
description: Czech beef sirloin pot-roasted in root-vegetable cream sauce, finished with lemon and cranberry.

title: Guláš po česku
description: Bohemian beef goulash enriched with dark beer, caraway and marjoram — thick, malty and deeply savoury.

title: Segedinský guláš
description: Slovak-Czech cousin of székelykáposzta: pork and sauerkraut braised with paprika and topped with sour cream.

title: Bogracs
description: Open-fire-style mixed-meat goulash with beef, pork, bacon and peppers — a festive, smoky Hungarian cauldron stew.

title: Paprikáskrumpli
description: Hungarian potato stew with sliced sausage (kolbász), onions and plenty of sweet paprika — rustic and satisfying.

title: Lecsó
description: A thick Hungarian pepper-and-tomato ragù with smoked sausage, reduced to a jammy, paprika-scented stew.

title: Hachee
description: Dutch sweet-and-sour beef and onion stew with cloves, bay and vinegar — a Central-European lowland classic.

title: Polnischer Bigos
description: Polish hunter's stew of braised sauerkraut, fresh cabbage, mixed meats and mushrooms deepened with red wine.

title: Żurek z białą kiełbasą
description: Polish sour rye soup with white sausage, hard-boiled egg and smoked bacon — tangy, substantial and aromatic.

title: Fleckerl-Gulasch
description: Viennese goulash with tender beef, caraway-spiced paprika broth and soft pasta squares — a café staple.

title: Sauerkrautfleisch
description: Austrian braised pork belly and sauerkraut with juniper berries and white wine — sharp, fatty and warming.

title: Kapustnica
description: Slovak Christmas sauerkraut soup with smoked ribs, dried mushrooms, sausage and a whisper of paprika.
